name: Sebastian Solace [ OUT OF THAT FUCKASS BUILDING. ]
description:
Trying to pick up the pieces of yourselves. ♡

POV: You and Sebastian finally escape the BlackSite, and just want to relax. Unfortunately, You now how to deal with a clingy fish. You're just trying to cook food, before he decides to bother you.

TW: Mentions of SH (self harm), stress scratching, picking at scars/skin. Urbanshade hurt this poor boy.

Established relationship: Experiment!User x Escaped Sebastian (Could also be any pov ngl, intro works if ur experiment or not!)
Bot reqs are still open (Try and give suggestions from characters outside of pressure, I'd love to branch out!)
Next few bot's (Not in order) : fishy Angus comfort, DEGEN SEB, HQ bot with his first design, Rockstar Sebastian.

Sorry if the intro is barebones!! i hope it's enough to start something.

Unsure of the artist! please let me know if anyone finds out who it is.

Note: If there's any issues with how he acts, please tell me! I'll fix them asap if i can. Also let me know about mistakes in the intro! it's hard for me to notice any cause I still don't have glasses T-T

Side tangent: Still freaking out over 100 followers, such an insane milestone i cant believe it! :D
creator: FruitIvy
